database_metadata.name: ECU institutional knowledge
database_metadata.scope: Verified institutional facts used for academic questions

university_core.university_model: Private Egyptian university with Egyptian-Chinese academic cooperation

financial_architecture_2023_2024_egp.payment_structure: Paid in two installments: 60% first, then 40%

international_requirements.general_mandate: Applicants should confirm current requirements through ecu.edu.eg or the admissions office.

pedagogical_framework.total_credit_hours_required: 180 credit hours under the legacy plan or 145 credit hours under the new plan
pedagogical_framework.credit_hour_definition: A credit hour represents the academic workload assigned to a course.

leadership.head_of_department: Department leadership is managed through the Faculty of Engineering and Technology.
